name: Mean Girls
description: Tina Fey's 2004 high-school comedy about the Plastics, the Burn Book, and not letting Wednesdays go by without pink.

questions.q: Who stars as new girl Cady Heron in Mean Girls?

source.notes: Lohan also previously starred in Freaky Friday and The Parent Trap.

questions.q: Who plays queen bee Regina George?

source.notes: McAdams was actually older than Lohan when cast.

questions.q: What day of the week do the Plastics wear pink?

source.notes: 'On Wednesdays we wear pink.'

questions.q: What is the name of the gossip-filled scrapbook that drives the plot?

source.notes: The book is filled with nasty notes about classmates.

questions.q: Who plays the 'dimwitted' plastic Karen Smith?

source.notes: Seyfried's breakthrough role; later Mamma Mia!

questions.q: Which 30 Rock creator wrote the Mean Girls screenplay — and plays math teacher Ms. Norbury?

source.notes: Based on Rosalind Wiseman's nonfiction book 'Queen Bees and Wannabes.'

questions.q: What is the name of Cady's love interest at North Shore High?

source.notes: Played by Jonathan Bennett.

questions.q: What is the name of the third plastic, Regina's right-hand?

source.notes: Played by Lacey Chabert.

questions.q: Who plays Cady's rebellious outsider friend Janis Ian?

source.notes: Caplan later starred in Masters of Sex.

questions.q: Who directed the original 2004 Mean Girls?

source.notes: Waters also directed Freaky Friday (2003).

questions.q: In which state is Cady living before she moves to Illinois for high school?
choices: Kenya (or rather, she's homeschooled in Africa)

source.notes: Her zoologist parents worked in Africa, Kenya specifically.

questions.q: Mean Girls was based on a real-life guide for parents written by whom?

source.notes: 'Queen Bees and Wannabes' (2002).

questions.q: Who plays Regina's mother, the 'cool mom' Mrs. George?

source.notes: Poehler was only 7 years older than McAdams.

questions.q: What high school does the film's action center on?

source.notes: Fictional Chicago-area high school.

questions.q: What meat-substitute trick does Cady use to sabotage Regina's figure?
choices: Kalteen bars (muscle-loss bars masqueraded as weight-loss)
Protein shakes laced with olive oil

source.notes: Cady passes 'muscle-loss bars' off as diet aids.

questions.q: Which vehicle injures Regina during the chaotic climax?

source.original_a: Distributing photocopies of the Burn Book
source.notes: Regina gets hit by a school bus.

questions.q: What 'ultimate' item does Cady break into pieces and hand out at Spring Fling after being named queen?

source.notes: Symbolizing that every girl is 'a little bit' of a winner.

questions.q: What school activity does Cady join that the Plastics mock, but which helps her find her voice?

source.notes: Cady wins a tiebreaker calculus question at State.

questions.q: Mean Girls was adapted into a hit Broadway musical that opened in what year?

source.notes: Opened April 2018; book by Tina Fey, music by Jeff Richmond.

questions.q: A Paramount movie-musical adaptation of Mean Girls was released in what year?

source.notes: Released January 12, 2024.

questions.q: Who is the narrator and framing storyteller of the original film?

source.notes: Lohan's Cady narrates her first year at North Shore.

questions.q: What is the infamous line said by Damian, the 'almost too gay to function' best friend, about Gretchen Wieners' hair?
choices: 'It's so big, it's full of secrets.'
'That hair's got its own zip code.'

source.notes: Played by Daniel Franzese.
